name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

interface.shortDescription: Spec, plan, build, test, review, and ship workflows for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Agent Skills provides production-grade engineering workflows for AI coding agents across the full software development lifecycle: idea refinement, specs, planning, incremental implementation, test-driven development, browser testing, debugging, code review, security hardening, performance optimization, documentation, CI/CD, and shipping.
defaultPrompt: Help me turn this idea into a spec and implementation plan.
Review this code for quality, security, and simplification opportunities.
Help me build, test, and ship this feature.
